_comment: Agent registry. Single source of truth for launch-agent.sh, chq-tmux.sh, and the Electron remote. Add a new agent by appending one entry — no new bash file needed.

_field_docs.id: Stable lookup key. Used by launch-agent.sh <id>, chq-tmux.sh start <id>, and the Electron remote button id.
_field_docs.display_name: Human-facing label. Claude runtimes pass it to -n <Name>; other runtimes use it for pane labels and AgentRemote UI.
_field_docs.runtime: Agent CLI runtime. Supported values: codex, claude, hermes, openclaw. Defaults to codex for missing legacy entries while Claude tokens are constrained.
_field_docs.allow_claude_runtime: Set true only for an intentional Claude runtime entry. Tests fail any runtime=claude entry without this explicit opt-in.
_field_docs.model: Optional runtime-specific model. Claude defaults to claude-opus-4-7[1m]; Codex defaults to gpt-5.5.
_field_docs.reasoning_effort: Optional runtime-specific effort/thinking level. Claude maps to --effort; Codex maps to model_reasoning_effort; OpenClaw maps to --thinking.
_field_docs.provider: Optional provider for runtimes that expose one, currently Hermes.
_field_docs.sandbox: Optional Codex sandbox mode. Defaults to danger-full-access for Codex entries launched from this local operator HUD.
_field_docs.approval_policy: Optional Codex approval policy. Defaults to never for Codex entries launched from this local operator HUD.
_field_docs.runtime_args: Optional argv array appended to the generated runtime command for runtime-specific flags.
_field_docs.tmux_target: Pane title used for broadcast + status targeting. Defaults to lowercased rename_to when present, otherwise lowercased display_name. Only set explicitly to override that derivation.
_field_docs.cwd: Working directory the launcher cd's into before exec. Tilde-expanded by launch-agent.sh.
_field_docs.color: Claude-only argument to /color. Set during Claude auto-inject; ignored by Codex/Hermes/OpenClaw.
_field_docs.theme_color: Hex color string (e.g. '#00f2ff') used by AgentRemote to generate per-agent CSS variables at runtime. Controls the active-border glow and radial-orb palette. Picked in the Add Agent modal. Falls back to --accent if omitted.
_field_docs.rename_to: Claude-only argument to /rename. Non-Claude runtimes keep the tmux pane title unless tmux_target is set.
_field_docs.startup_slash: Slash command auto-injected after boot (default /gogo). Empty string disables.
_field_docs.auto_restart: If false, chq-tmux.sh's pane_loop exits after the agent quits instead of relooping after RESTART_DELAY. Default true (omit the field to mean true). Editable from the Electron remote's right-click menu.
_field_docs.pre_launch: Optional path to a hook script run before execing the configured runtime. Tilde-expanded. Replaces the inline telegram-cleanup blocks.
_field_docs.env: Optional map of env vars to export before exec (e.g. KOKORO_VOICE for the telegram-voice-followup hook).
_field_docs.avatar: Optional avatar SVG filename inside remote-app/assets/. Defaults to <id>.svg if unset. Used by the Electron remote button render.
